title: Wang Qingyue
content:
A messenger sent by the 
Yin and Yang Sect
 from a rank 4 cultivation country.
[
1
]
 Traveled trough an Ancient transfer array with 
Wang Lin
 and 
Duanmu Ji
 to the 
Chaotic Broken Stars
. There they met 
Gun Lan
, 
Xu Liqing
 (together with a 
young man)
 and 
Hunchback Meng
.

Plot
[
]

Duanmu Ji ask his help with his Five Element Escape Technique that useful for first trial of 
Land of Ancient God
. After arrive at Chaotic Broken Stars, while waiting the others to arrive he tried to battle his clone that generated form Chaotic Broken Stars formation that always a minor realm higher than the intruder. On stone circular pillars that lead to first trial he escaped with Duanmu Ji and separated with others. They are seen again on third trial struggling with Wandering Souls and captured by revived and demonized Hunchback Meng. He then thrown them into Blood Sea, there they become a demon by 
Tuo Sen
.

↑

Chapter 166
